figures.caption: Fig. 2. ROC curves from test data for the baseline CNN model. Both Class 0 and Class 1 achieve an AUC of approximately 0.81, demonstrating competitive performance compared to transfer learning approaches.
Fig. 4. ROC curve for Class 0 (Normal) using the VGG16 transfer learning model. The AUC value of 0.81 reflects reliable detection of normal retinal images.

Fig. 3. ROC curve for Class 1 (Disease) using the VGG16 transfer learning model. The model achieves an AUC of 0.81, indicating good discriminative performance between diseased and normal retinal images.
